full_prompt: Design the single-piece front steering knuckle for an Efficycle SAE NIS S14 Advanced Hybrid three-wheel vehicle. Per SAE NIS S14 rulebook, the vehicle kerb is capped at 150 kg (135 kg bonus), fasteners must be SAE grade 5 or ISO M8.8 minimum, threaded joints must engage at least 2 threads past the nut. Knuckle geometry: outer envelope 150 mm (H) x 100 mm (W) x 90 mm (depth). Features: (a) a tapered press-fit bore for a 52 mm OD x 30 mm ID x 16 mm wide 6204-2RS sealed ball bearing (ISO 5753 H7 bore tolerance, +0/-0.013 mm); (b) an upper ball-joint taper seat at M14 x 1.5, 8 deg included taper; (c) a lower ball-joint taper seat identical; (d) a steering tie-rod M12 x 1.25 taper seat, offset 60 mm from hub center; (e) a brake caliper mounting pad with 2 x M10 x 1.5 threaded holes on a 90 mm pitch. Material: machined aluminium 7075-T6 (Young's 71.7 GPa, Poisson 0.33, density 2810 kg/m^3, yield 503 MPa, UTS 572 MPa). Vehicle parameters: total mass 150 kg (driver + pax), CG height 700 mm, wheelbase 1400 mm, front track 900 mm, max cornering 0.6 g, max braking 0.8 g, max bump 3 g vertical. Load cases: LC1 (Cornering) — lateral force at contact patch 442 N (150 kg x 0.6 g / 2 front wheels), vertical 736 N, longitudinal 0; LC2 (Braking) — longitudinal 589 N rearward (150 kg x 0.8 g / 2), vertical 736 N (load transfer assumed captured), lateral 0; LC3 (Bump) — vertical 2208 N (150 x 3 g / 2); LC4 (Combined max) — LC1 + LC3 = lateral 442 N + vertical 2208 N simultaneously. Each load is applied as a point load at the wheel contact patch, with the knuckle bearing bore inner race held as the reaction; ball-joint tapers apply reaction forces back into the upper/lower control arms (treat arm pickup points as spherical constraints). Fasteners must be M8 grade 5 minimum in all threaded interfaces and engage 2 threads past the nut per rule. Pass/fail: (R1) max von Mises under each LC < 335 MPa (7075-T6 yield / 1.5); (R2) max combined stress under LC4 < 335 MPa; (R3) bearing bore ovality under LC4 < 0.010 mm (H7 tolerance preservation); (R4) tie-rod taper seat stress under LC1 < 300 MPa (preserve tooling finish); (R5) first-mode linear buckling of any thin web in knuckle >= 4.0 under LC4; (R6) knuckle mass <= 1.2 kg so unsprung mass budget is respected; (R7) on all threaded holes, full-thread engagement length must be >= 1.2 x bolt diameter (covers 2-thread-past-nut rule with margin). Primary verification: linear static structural FEA for LC1-LC4, linear buckling eigenvalue for LC4. Vibration modal, thermal, fluid, and radiation analyses are not required. Output one STEP AP242 single-body knuckle plus a report listing mass, max von Mises per case, bearing bore ovality under LC4, buckling factor, and a table of thread engagement lengths.
short_prompt:
Design the single-piece front steering knuckle for an Efficycle SAE NIS S14 Advanced Hybrid three-wheel vehicle (kerb <= 150 kg including driver + pax). Fasteners must be SAE grade 5 / ISO 8.8 minimum, thread engagement >= 1.2 x bolt diameter (2 threads past nut rule with margin).

Envelope: 150 x 100 x 90 mm; 52 mm OD x 30 mm ID x 16 mm 6204-2RS bearing bore (H7 +0/-0.013 mm); M14x1.5 and M12x1.25 ball-joint / tie-rod tapers (8 deg included); 2 x M10x1.5 brake caliper threads on a 90 mm pitch; 7075-T6 aluminum.

Vehicle: 150 kg total, CG 700 mm, wheelbase 1400 mm, front track 900 mm, max cornering 0.6 g, max braking 0.8 g, max bump 3 g.

Factor regime: yield FoS 1.5; bearing bore ovality <= 0.010 mm; tie-rod seat stress <= 300 MPa (finish preservation); linear buckling eigenvalue >= 4.0 on thin webs under LC4.

Load cases.
- Cornering: 442 N lateral + 736 N vertical at the contact patch.
- Braking: 589 N rearward + 736 N vertical.
- Bump: 2208 N vertical.
- Combined max: LC1 + LC3 = 442 N lateral + 2208 N vertical simultaneously.

prompt.title: Efficycle S14 front steering knuckle
prompt.brief: 7075-T6 machined knuckle for a 150 kg three-wheel Efficycle with 0.6 g cornering, 0.8 g braking, 3 g bump, M8.8 min fasteners, and rule-compliant thread engagement.
